articles.description: XRP investors are keeping an eye on a crucial price level this week. Bitcoin has managed to reclaim above $100,000 and Ethereum is over $2,300. XRP has recorded a modest increase as well but still hovers at the lower part of the $2 price range. articles.title: Ethereum chart pattern supports 'moon shot' rally to new price highs if confirmed — Trader
articles.description: Key Takeaways:Veteran trader Peter Brandt suggests a potential Ethereum rally to $3,800–$4,800 if ETH breaks above a rising wedge pattern. A short-term pullback may occur as the taker buy-sell ratio drops below one, signaling caution from futures traders. Ethereum’s native token Ether (ETH) opened its weekly candle at $1,807 on May 7, and now it is close to recording its highest 7-day returns of 38% since December 2020. articles.title: Ethereum liquidations hit $180 million in 24 hours, surpassing Bitcoin losses
articles.description: 12-5-2025 – In a turbulent 24-hour period for cryptocurrency markets, Ethereum has borne the brunt of substantial liquidations, with a staggering $180 million wiped out, dwarfing Bitcoin’s losses of $74. 25 million, as reported by BlockBeats citing Coinglass data. articles.title: Ethereum to $10K 'can't be ruled out' as ETH price makes sharp gains vs. SOL, XRP
articles.description: Key takeaways:Ether has rebounded from key parabolic and triangle support levels, reviving the case for a $10,000 breakout. Historical fractals and RSI recovery mirror past pre-rally setups seen in 2016 and 2020. Altseason signals and strength against rivals like SOL and XRP boost Ethereum’s potential to outperform. Ether (ETH), Ethereum’s native token, has soared over 44% in just three days to surpass $2,600 on May 11, fueling fresh speculation of a run toward $10,000 in the coming months

articles.title: 40 Million Cardano (ADA) in 48 Hours: Whales Bullish?
Pectra lets hackers drain wallets with just an offchain signature
articles.description: Ethereum’s latest network upgrade, Pectra, introduced powerful new features aimed at improving scalability and smart account functionality — but it also opened a dangerous new attack vector that could allow hackers to drain funds from user wallets using only an offchain signature. articles.title: Solana Fixes Zero-Day Bug That Risked Unlimited Token Minting
articles.description: Catenaa, Saturday, May 10, 2025-Solana validators have patched a critical zero-day vulnerability that could have allowed attackers to mint unlimited tokens or steal user funds, the Solana Foundation announced recently. The flaw, discovered April 16, targeted the ZK ElGamal Proof program — a system used to verify zero-knowledge proofs supporting confidential token transfers under Solana’s […]

articles.title: El Salvador adds 8 more Bitcoin, defying IMF warnings as reserves top $641M
articles.description: 11-5-2025 – El Salvador has bolstered its national Bitcoin holdings by acquiring eight additional coins this week, elevating its total reserves to an impressive 6,173 BTC, valued at over $641 million.
